title: Display and Number Input Foundation
user_story: As a user, I want to see the calculator display with numbers so that I can enter values for calculation
acceptance_criteria: Calculator displays an empty screen when first loaded
All number buttons (0-9) are visible and clickable on the interface
Each button press immediately updates the displayed value in real-time
Display shows up to 12 digits without truncation or overflow errors

title: Basic Operator Selection
user_story: As a user, I want to select mathematical operations between numbers so that I can perform calculations with addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division
acceptance_criteria: Operator buttons (+, -, *, /) are visible and clickable on the interface
Selecting an operator stores it for later calculation without executing immediately
Multiple operators in sequence don't cause conflicts or errors
Display shows current expression with selected operator between numbers

title: Equals Calculation and Error Handling
user_story: As a user, I want to calculate the result of my entered expression so that I get an immediate answer for any valid calculation
acceptance_criteria: Pressing equals calculates and displays the correct mathematical result
Division by zero shows appropriate error message instead of crashing
New number input after seeing results clears previous operation state
Invalid expressions (like multiple consecutive operators) are handled gracefully
